ships.name: Party-fied Tachytia (POOT)
ships.description: This was once an Avgi sublight starship, now it is the ULTIMATE party machine.

ships.name: THE CUBE (Poot)
ships.description: If you believe in the cube, the cube will believe in you...

outfits.name: Prototype Fusion Cannon
outfits.description: This is a personally obtained prototype Fusion Cannon, a deadly, massive spinal weapon. Where it came from, nobody knows except the owner, and those who wish to ask are too afraid of being on the receiving end.

outfits.name: Stacked Optical Lasing Generator (POOT)
outfits.description: One of these stacked collections of Optical Laser Generators processes enough photons that its internal tempurature can rival that of some smaller nuclear reactors, with the culprit of this being how compacted and closely positioned they are to one another. 	The wavelength of light produced in the coil can be altered by swapping the diodes and fiber dopants, allowing the Optical Lasing Generator to support up to ten basic Optical Lasers.

outfits.name: Laser-Tag Rifle (POOT)
outfits.description: Wake up samurai, we got rainbows to taste.

outfits.name: Partycapacitor Bank
outfits.description: Unfortunately the POWER of PARTY is catastrophically bad at handling ionic damage.

outfits.name: Party Fission Core
outfits.description: All the power of an electrostatic gas party fission reactor, right beneath your fingertips. 	Run at the very edge of its thermal limits, the Party Fission Core does not tolerate any lack of party what-so-ever, and will explode those it deems lacking of party.

outfits.name: A-7200 "Party" Amat Drive
outfits.description: The fastest Avgi starships were propelled not just by their engines, but also by immense banks of lasers and particle beams stationed in the Anax system, pushing ships to velocities in excess of 0.2c before braking with a magsail or plasma magnet. Just before the invention of the hyperdrive, however, the Avgi perfected this beam-core antimatter drive, capable of pushing a starship with sufficient antimatter fuel to 0.4c and perhaps beyond. Requiring immense quantities of antimatter, the amat farms around Anax such as Antivli Station would have been strained to their limits had this design entered mass production, but the surprise invention of the hyperdrive rendered it laughably obsolete overnight.

outfits.name: Emporer Beetle Pendant (POOT)
outfits.description: A pendant once belonging to a mighty Hai or Unfettered leader, now yours, for better or worse. 	When holding this pendant you feel your mind imbued with strange thoughts and feelings, and the weight of nobility or higher powers, as though you're standing on a tall hill looking down upon all others around you...

outfits.name: Overclocked Scram Drive (POOT)
outfits.description: The Overclocked Scram Drive is used by those stuck in a pinch. It uses excess amounts of fuel, at the cost of being able to jump at even higher speeds than the standard Scram Drive. Due to the exorbant jumping fuel cost, all Overclocked Scram Drives are equipped with a small ramscoop.

outfits.name: Freighter Drive (POOT)
outfits.description: The Freighter Drive is a heavyduty hyperdrive designed primarily to grant super heavy freight vessels the ability to escape and avoid becoming sitting ducks for opportunistic pirates. Capable of entering hyperspace at a much higher speed than an overclocked hyperdrive, it utilizes a complex internal mapping algorithm that allows for quick connection to hyperspace lanes at incredibly high speeds. However, it is very strenuous on the drive to send large vessels into hyperspace at high velocity, with heavier ships causing the drive to lack the power to fully energize without an additional boost to its fuel intake. Due to the exorbant jumping fuel cost, all Freighter Drives are equipped with a ramscoop.

outfits.name: Quantum Jump Drive (POOT)
outfits.description: The workings of the jump drive are a total mystery. The quantum jump drive is a marvel, even amongst the most advanced species in the galaxy. It is capable of jumping at higher speeds and a longer range than a typical jump drive, while also remaining fairly compact for its capabilities.

outfits.name: Hyperactive Jump Drive (POOT)
outfits.description: The workings of the jump drive are a total mystery. This jump drive is capable of jumping at very high speeds compared to an average jump drive, but uses more hyperspace fuel to do so.

outfits.name: Horizon Jump Drive (POOT)
outfits.description: The workings of the jump drive are a total mystery. This jump drive is capable of going extraordinary distances, but struggles to send larger ships across hyperspace, causing it to use much more fuel.

outfits.name: Quantum Chamber (POOT)
outfits.description: A confined chamber containing a Solarian Quantum Reactor. You cannot even begin to understand how it works, but know it is capable of powering and controlling all sorts of experimental equipment.

outfits.name: X12900 Ion Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: A gigantic set of Ion engines, designed for ships of equally great size. Few ships in the galaxy can even carry one of these engines, let alone power and cool them. 	Ion engines consume less energy than plasma engines and produce less heat, but they also take up more space for the same amount of thrust.

outfits.name: X21700 Ion Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: The largest of all ion engines, created specifically for the Navy's superheavy capital ships. These engines alone are larger than some ships in human space. 	Ion engines consume less energy than plasma engines and produce less heat, but they also take up more space for the same amount of thrust.

outfits.name: Terrorizer Plasma Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: A gargantuan set of thrusters, capable of moving the heaviest of capital ships with ease. 	Plasma engines are a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less energy efficient and produce more heat.

outfits.name: Domination Plasma Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: A set of thrusters so massive, few ships even have enough space for the cooling systems required to run them. The dinosaur printed on the shipping box of the thrusters is even bigger than on the previous models packaging, with more rows of teeth. In fact it's so big, it's almost to scale of an actual T-Rex. It also doesn't fit fully on the front of the shipping box. 	Plasma engines are a bit more powerful than ion engines of the same size, but they are less energy efficient and produce more heat.

outfits.name: A2150 Atomic Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive set of Deep Skys Atomic Steering and Propulsion thrusters. Designed for superheavy warships, few human engines can surpase these gigantic engines in their raw propultion and power.

outfits.name: A4270 Atomic Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: Both the priciest and largest engine ever sold in human space, the A4270 Atomic thruster is the bee's knee's of gargantuan capital propulsion systems. These engines are capable of producing such a massive amount of thrust, many captains often confuse the flame expelled from the exhaust to be some sort of huge atomic antiburner.

outfits.name: Double Armageddon Core (POOT)
outfits.description: Desperate times call for desperate measures, hence the creation of the Double Armageddon core. Not very efficient as far as heat generation goes, but when you need massive amounts of energy for massive Navy capital ships, nothing smaller would even come close to sufficing.

outfits.name: Triple Armageddon Core (POOT)
outfits.description: The sheer radiation emenating from this colossal piece of equipment is enough alone to melt weaker metals.

outfits.name: Nuclear Power Plant (POOT)
outfits.description: If you asked most pilots if they would put a nuclear power plant on their ship, they'd look at you as if you were crazy. That is, until they see it up in perfect working operation. A Nuclear Power Plant provides massive amounts of energy, while also requiring multiple crew to properly operate.

outfits.name: Engineered Nuclear Power Plant (POOT)
outfits.description: Believe it or not, hiring a qualified engineer to create the blueprint for a nuclear powerplant installed on an interstellar space vessel will help the nuclear power plant run more optimally. Now boasting an improved cooling system, further optimization of the uranium insertion and extraction process, improved reactor ventilation and heat expulsion, and now has batteries included.

outfits.name: Liquid Hydrogen Cooler (POOT)
outfits.description: For extreme needs of internal tempurature change, the Liquid Hydrogen Cooler is a common goto in human space. .

outfits.name: Regenerative Liquid Cooler (POOT)
outfits.description: Only the largest of overburdened capital ships would need such a massive amount of cooling. By utilizing an advanced process of extracting heat from the ships internal systems via fuel lines before fuel is sent to the engines, it allows for greater use of refridgerant after it has already passed through the built in heat exchangers, resulting in one of the most efficient human internal systems ever made.

outfits.name: NTS-I 450 Radiothermalvoltaic (POOT)
outfits.description: While slightly unstable, this generator actively harvest energy from decaying isotopes at a far more efficient rate than any other nuclear decay-based generator on the market, while also running slightly hotter than some higher end models. It might be more efficient to install a larger reactor instead, it is far more compact than most availible.

outfits.name: Large Bunk Room (POOT)
outfits.description: A larger bunk room, capable of supporting an additional 8 passengers (or crew).

outfits.name: Worldship Bunk Room (POOT)
outfits.description: Typically reserved for capital and world ships, this bunkroom can support a wopping 32 people. Unfortunately, having so many people aboard your ship, some manage to get into places they are not supposed to. One such place being the room with the ship's thermostat. As a result, it has the unfortunate but unavoidable side effect that is the the constant adjustment of the thermostat by numerous people...

outfits.name: Large Fuel Pod (POOT)
outfits.description: An even larger fuel pod, allowing your ship to make a few additional hyperspace jumps before it needs to land and refuel.

outfits.name: Large Fuel System (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of large fuel pods interlinked togethor, allowing your ship to make multiple additional hyperspace jumps before it needs to land and refuel. The lines connecting the fuel pods together also contain enough hyperspace fuel to allow for an additional hyperspace jump.

outfits.name: Scrapped Star Barge (POOT)
outfits.description: A scrapped Star Barge, likely scavenged by someone with a less-than-acceptable reputation. While not worth anywhere near as much as one sold in a shipyard, when brought to one of the local mechanics to be scrapped for parts, they offered a bit of a more "unconventional" option: Weld it onto the hull of your ship.    The process is very labor intensive, causing its cost to be out of the range for most pilots to even consider. As one could imagine, this level of ship modification comes with all sorts of issues... While also offering some very unique benefits.

outfits.name: Scrapped Sparrow (POOT)
outfits.description: A scrapped Sparrow, likely scavenged by someone with a less-than-acceptable reputation. While not worth anywhere near as much as one sold in a shipyard, when brought to one of the local mechanics to be scrapped for parts, they offered a bit of a more "unconventional" option: Weld it onto the hull of your ship.    The process is very labor intensive, causing its cost to be out of the range for most pilots to even consider. As one could imagine, this level of ship modification comes with all sorts of issues... While also offering some very unique benefits.

outfits.name: Scrapped Shuttle (POOT)
outfits.description: A scrapped Shuttle, likely scavenged by someone with a less-than-acceptable reputation. While not worth anywhere near as much as one sold in a shipyard, when brought to one of the local mechanics to be scrapped for parts, they offered a bit of a more "unconventional" option: Weld it onto the hull of your ship.    The process is very labor intensive, causing its cost to be out of the range for most pilots to even consider. As one could imagine, this level of ship modification comes with all sorts of issues... While also offering some very unique benefits.

outfits.name: Scrapped Heavy Shuttle (POOT)
outfits.description: A scrapped Heavy Shuttle, likely scavenged by someone with a less-than-acceptable reputation. While not worth anywhere near as much as one sold in a shipyard, when brought to one of the local mechanics to be scrapped for parts, they offered a bit of a more "unconventional" option: Weld it onto the hull of your ship.    The process is very labor intensive, causing its cost to be out of the range for most pilots to even consider. As one could imagine, this level of ship modification comes with all sorts of issues... While also offering some very unique benefits.

outfits.name: Scrapped Freighter (POOT)
outfits.description: A scrapped Freighter, likely scavenged by someone with a less-than-acceptable reputation. While not worth anywhere near as much as one sold in a shipyard, when brought to one of the local mechanics to be scrapped for parts, they offered a bit of a more "unconventional" option: Weld it onto the hull of your ship.    The process is very labor intensive, causing its cost to be out of the range for most pilots to even consider. As one could imagine, this level of ship modification comes with all sorts of issues... While also offering some very unique benefits.

outfits.name: Quantum Supercapacitor (POOT)
outfits.description: Through the incredible properties of quantum mechanics, this supercapacitor is capable of storing absurd amounts of energy for its size.

outfits.name: eSRC-AA Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: External Stellar Radiation Collectors (or eSRCs) are hefty pieces of equipment that allow for a greater collection of solar plasma than a standard ramscoop, while also having a hefty power draw in order to fully function. Each eSRC Fuel Generator is also equiped with a smaller backup ramscoop incase the main collector fails.

outfits.name: eSRC-BB Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: This small hyperspace fuel generator is capable of generating fuel faster than the AA model, but with a higher heat output and power draw.

outfits.name: eSRC-CC Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: A midsized fuel generator, capable of rapid collection of hyperspace fuel.

outfits.name: eSRC-DD Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: A larger fuel generator, capable of collecting solar plasma at a high rate from the surrounding space.

outfits.name: eSRC-EE Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: A very large slar plasma collector. Typically only seen on larger freighters, this fuel generator is capable of very rapid collection and fabrication of hyperspace fuel from solar plasma.

outfits.name: eSRC-FF Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: Most would consider a fuel generator of this size impractical. Its power draw is so high, most ships would need their own designated fuel-focused reactor in order to power it. However desperate times call for depserate measures, serving as the solution for the the freight organizations across the galaxy that have expressed their dire need for more hyperspace fuel capacity amongst their starships.

outfits.name: eSRC-GG Fuel Generator Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: Some capital ships are so large, it would require a notable amount of time, money, and fuel just to be able to land and refuel at a spaceport. This is the sole reason why the absolutely titanic eSRC-GG Fuel Generator Cell was ever even conceptualized. By allowing for rapid hyperspace fuel regeneration without the need to land and takeoff from an additional spaceport, it can save mega-freight captains and corporations from having to spend excessive amounts of time and money solely around their refueling process.

outfits.name: nGVF-FF Aftermarket Fuel Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: A heavily modified afterarket Fuel Cell. While there are many stronger and more efficient methods of energy generation out on the market, not all planets are as easily accessible, causing some to be skipped when manuifacturers decide where they are willing to ship their supply to. The result is this mechination of fuel cells, combined together to produce a greater energy output.

outfits.name: nGVF-GG Aftermarket Fuel Cell (POOT)
outfits.description: Larger than most heavy reactors, this collection of extensively modified and patched together fuel cells can produce far more energy than any other fuel cell availible on the market. By ditching any attempts at efficiency for more power at any cost, this highly inefficient fuel cell can output enough energy to operate a slim few capital ships, assuming it doesn't burn them down first.

outfits.name: Small Systems Block (POOT)
outfits.description: This is a small systems block designed for drones and fighters. Equipped with a battery pack, hyperdrive, miniature fuel generator and shield system, these collections of outfits are designed as a bare-bones system for the smallest of ships to still be able to operate, albeit at a vary inefficient capacity.

outfits.name: LP1027a Battery Pack (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of the huge LP576a Batteries wired in series. The result being a bit of lost total energy capacity, but takes up notably less space by being reconfigured and connected together.

outfits.name: LP1740a Battery Pack (POOT)
outfits.description: The immense size of this trio of batteries can store so much energy, a smaller vessel with one equipped may be able to fly through multiple star systems without even having a generator installed.

outfits.name: RN144-VC Shield Regenerator (POOT)
outfits.description: An experimental new shield technology funded largely by the Republic Navy, this smart shield generator has a much greater adaptibility to shield generation than the standard shield Generators. It contains an internal system analysis control board, which can observe and detect different patterns in a shields depletion. It then will reconfigure the shield matrix to focus its generation in a specific area of high depletion, resulting in a far more direct and rapid shield generation. The analysis and redirection of shields does however add additional power draw in order to complete its operations.

outfits.name: RN265-RT Shield Regenerator (POOT)
outfits.description: An upgrade over the RN144, this larger shield regenerator can perform its analysis faster than the RN144, while also having a larger internal shield generation matrix. Typically only seen on larger vessels, this regenerator may overwhelm smaller reactors all on its own.

outfits.name: RN377-DX Shield Regenerator (POOT)
outfits.description: The largest of the Navy sponsered shield generators. Designed for their capital ships, these shield generators are capable of holding up against weapons more technologically advanced than most seen in human space.

outfits.name: Tectonic Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive afterburner capable of propelling the largest of human warships ships. It has gained notoriety amongst some captains for its ability to cause temporary obstructions from the huge cloud of smoke it emits when active.

outfits.name: Heavy Tectonic Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive afterburner capable of propelling the largest of human warships ships. It has gained notoriety amongst some captains for its ability to cause temporary obstructions from the huge cloud of smoke it emits when active.

outfits.name: Combustion Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: A very old model of afterburner once utilized by humans centuries ago to propel their first starships into orbit. Still sometimes used by pilots from worlds with less access to newer propulsion technology, the Combustion Afterburner provides very strong ammounts of propulsion for its size, but being an ancient human design, is incredibly fuel hungry. It has gained notoriety amongst some captains for its ability to cause temporary obstructions from the huge cloud of smoke it emits when active

outfits.name: Plasma Infused Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: The Ionic Afterburner was designed by the Syndicate to compensate for the primary weakness of an ordinary afterburner: namely, that it consumes hyperspace fuel at a prodigious rate. Ionic afterburners instead use a small amount of fuel combined with a large burst of energy from your ship's batteries to achieve the same effect.

outfits.name: A175 Atomic Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: Amongst the largest of afterburners availible on the market, Deep Sky's Atomic Afterburner uses the latest Deep technology to utilize a mix of fuel and energy to achieve an incredible amount of momentary thrust.    A few Deep Sky engineers love to tell the tale that when the Atomic Afterburner was in development, they were being contacted through emergency channels from some concerned onlooking captains thinking that some of Deep Sky's hyperdrives were malfunctioning and causing their ships to be launched at incredible speeds, only to be dumbfounded when informed the ships had only switched their afterburners on.

outfits.name: A575 Atomic Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: Amongst the largest of afterburners availible on the market, Deep Sky's Atomic Afterburner uses the latest Deep technology to utilize a mix of fuel and energy to achieve an incredible amount of momentary thrust.    A few Deep Sky engineers love to tell the tale that when the Atomic Afterburner was in development, they were being contacted through emergency channels from some concerned onlooking captains thinking that some of Deep Sky's hyperdrives were malfunctioning and causing their ships to be launched at incredible speeds, only to be dumbfounded when informed the ships had only switched their afterburners on.

outfits.name: A945 Atomic Afterburner (POOT)
outfits.description: Amongst the largest of afterburners availible on the market, Deep Sky's Atomic Afterburner uses the latest Deep technology to utilize a mix of fuel and energy to achieve an incredible amount of momentary thrust.    A few Deep Sky engineers love to tell the tale that when the Atomic Afterburner was in development, they were being contacted through emergency channels from some concerned onlooking captains thinking that some of Deep Sky's hyperdrives were malfunctioning and causing their ships to be launched at incredible speeds, only to be dumbfounded when informed the ships had only switched their afterburners on.

outfits.name: B980 Nuclear Thruster (POOT)
outfits.description: A highly efficient experimental nuclear powered thruster. Being stronger than any of the standard thrusters in human space, and with its highly compact yet efficient design, one can't help but wonder where such a creation would have come from.

outfits.name: B985 Nuclear Steering (POOT)
outfits.description: A highly efficient experimental nuclear powered steering thruster. Being stronger than any of the standard thrusters in human space, and with its highly compact yet efficient design, one can't help but wonder where such a creation would have come from.

outfits.name: Heavy Ancient Combustion Thruster (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human thruster with a very powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the gal.

outfits.name: Heavy Ancient Combustion Steering (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human steering thruster with a very powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the galaxy.

outfits.name: Ancient Combustion Thruster (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human thruster with a decently powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the gal.

outfits.name: Ancient Combustion Steering (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human steering thruster with a nuclear powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the galaxy.

outfits.name: Light Ancient Combustion Thruster (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human thruster with a decently powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the gal.

outfits.name: Light Ancient Combustion Steering (POOT)
outfits.description: An ancient human steering thruster with a nuclear powerful push behind it for its size, but requires fuel in order to run. Designes like these were abandoned centuries ago for more modern energy based thrusters, but on very rare occaisions, one of these relics of a bygone era can be seen on a starship, traipsing across the galaxy.

outfits.name: Engines Expansion (POOT)
outfits.description: This expansion allows you to sacrifice some outfit space in order to make room for more propulsion systems, in situations where you need just a bit more space to install a particular system. It does not increase your cargo or weapon space. 	Unfortunately, rearranging the interior of your ship in such a fundamental way tends to interfere with its cooling systems.

outfits.name: Weapons Expansion (POOT)
outfits.description: This expansion allows you to sacrifice some outfit space in order to make room for more weapons, in situations where you need just a bit more space to install a particular system. It does not increase your weapon or engine space. 	Unfortunately, rearranging the interior of your ship in such a fundamental way tends to interfere with its cooling systems.

outfits.name: Outfit Docking Port Installation (POOT)
outfits.description: By converting a gun port into a makeshift docking bay, it can allow a ship to install additional outfits on its surface. 	Unfortunately, rearranging the exterior of your ship in such a fundamental way tends to interfere with its heat dispersion abilities.

outfits.name: Loading Bay Installation (POOT)
outfits.description: By converting a turret mount into a makeshift loading bay, it can allow a ship to carry additional cargo on its surface. 	Unfortunately, rearranging the exterior of your ship in such a fundamental way tends to interfere with its heat dispersion abilities.

outfits.name: Sextuple Plasma Core (POOT)
outfits.description: This is what it means to go even further beyond...     An organized mess of six plasma cores stacked ontop of each other, making up one of the largest generators to roam the skies. Only the most colossal of korath capital ships require one, let alone have the cooling capacity for it.

outfits.name: Huge Heat Shunt (POOT)
outfits.description: This collection of Korath cooling equipment weighs more than some smaller starships. The ideal solution for helping with the Korath's captial equipment's heating inefficiencies.

outfits.name: Systems Core (Huge) (POOT)
outfits.description: A colossal conglomeration of korath central systems and computers, designed with incredibly complex algorithms for maximum shield charging efficiency. At least, as close to maximum efficency as a central ship system of this size can be.

outfits.name: Automaton Control Center (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of central components from a variety of Korath automaton internal systems, this incredibly bulky control center is capable of fully automating almost any ship. Utilizing a custom internal microbot constructor, it can create and control enough microbots to fully automate any vessel its installed on. The process, however, requires a massive amount of space and power to fully energize and operate.

outfits.name: Optimized Plasma Core (POOT)
outfits.description: An incredibly powerful and optimized plasma fusion reactor, this modern recreation of the ancient Korath reactor is capable of a greater energy output while producing overall less heat. By confining its generation into a far more compact space, it is capable of working with particles at a far higher preassure and tempurature. The reactor itself is made out of much stronger and denser metals to be able to handle the increased internal load, making it weigh much more than standard Korath plasma cores.

outfits.name: Optimized Double Plasma Core (POOT)
outfits.description: A combination of two of the automatons modern Plasma Core reactors.

outfits.name: Optimized Triple Plasma Core (POOT)
outfits.description: For the largest of their capital ships, the Korath designed a fusion reactor far more powerful than any comparable human technology.

outfits.name: Optimized Sextuple Plasma Core (POOT)
outfits.description: This is what happens when years of unchecked autonomous war machines continue to evolve and grow. An unholy mechination of six fusion reactors, firing in unison to generate an overwhelming amount of energy. The heat output of this outfit is so intense, there are rumors if it being detectable by thermal radar equipment across multiple star systems.

outfits.name: Korath Omni-Drive Engines (Galactic Class) (POOT)
outfits.description: An absolute unit of its own class, these Korath omni-directional engines are larger than some of the Automatons smaller ships. Only the largest of Korath Warships could ever find a practical use in engines of this size. 	This Korath engine has been heavily modified to be partially installed in a ship's weapon space, allowing it to push the ship in reverse, steer side to side, and provide an additional boost to forward thrust.

outfits.name: Korath Omni-Drive Engines (Universe Class) (POOT)
outfits.description: Weighing as much as a medium-sized warship, these gargantuan Korath engines are the mother of all interstellar propulsion. From a distance, the jets of flame erupting from these titanic engines often tend to be confused for solar flares. That is, until those observing them realize there's actually a ship attatched to the roaring inferno blazing from the cluster of engine exhausts pipes. 	This Korath engine has been extesnively modified and overhauled, resulting in a need to be installed into the weapon space of a ship, allowing it to provide immensely strong thrust for the ship in reverse, steering side to side, and providing a colossal boost to forward thrust.

outfits.name: Huge Graviton Thruster (POOT)
outfits.description: These massive engines are capable of propelling even the largest of quarg cargo and warships as if they weigh close to nothing. 	They have strange capabilities which seem to violate the laws of physics as humanity understands them. Ships with these engines accelerate faster under their own power than one would expect, while also taking less impact from external forces.

outfits.name: Huge Graviton Steering (POOT)
outfits.description: The ability to turn as quick and swiftly as quarg ships can is something well wished amongst most human freighter pilots who have been lucky enough to have encountered a quarg ship with engines like these in equipped. 	They also have strange capabilities which seem to violate the laws of physics as humanity understands them. Ships with these engines accelerate faster under their own power than one would expect, while also taking less impact from external forces.

outfits.name: Huge Graviton Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: The sheer amount agility within these engines is almost unparalleled, while simultaneously being incredibly compact for such a powerful engine block. 	They also have strange capabilities which seem to violate the laws of physics as humanity understands them. Ships with these engines accelerate faster under their own power than one would expect, while also taking less impact from external forces.

outfits.name: Colossal Graviton Engines (POOT)
outfits.description: While these engines are in full operation, they consume more energy than a small fleet of human warships. Despite this, they are incredibly compact engines for their gargantuan size, showing just how advanced some of the Quargs techonolgy can be. 	They also have strange capabilities which seem to violate the laws of physics as humanity understands them. Ships with these engines accelerate faster under their own power than one would expect, while also taking less impact from external forces.

outfits.name: Quarg Quantum Vacuum Battery Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of Quarg Vaccuum Batteries. Through an unknown property of the Quargs technology, when these batteries are connected in series with one another, they are capable of storing a slightly increased amount of energy.

outfits.name: Quarg Supernova Generator (POOT)
outfits.description: By generating subatomic particles and through extreme amounts of internal preassure from collidng them, this generator is capable of producing monumental amounts of energy, far more than any current human technology could even dream of.

outfits.name: Quarg Heavy Antimatter Generator (POOT)
outfits.description: A monumental Anitmatter Generator made by the Quarg. This level of energy generation is unprecendented in most regions of space.    This outfit is typically used in the Quargs Capital ships.

outfits.name: Quarg Superheavy Antimatter Generator (POOT)
outfits.description: One of the strongest sources of interstellar power generation in known existence. This generator takes up so much space and weighs so much, it has its own built-in systems to reduce its impact on its host ships space travel. Capable of outputing more energy than an entire human navy fleet all by itself, it makes you wonder what kind of technology the Quarg could possibly have that needs this much power to run.    This outfit is typically used in the Quargs Capital ships.

outfits.name: Quarg Orion Shield Generator (POOT)

outfits.name: Quarg Master Repair Hub (POOT)
outfits.description: Installed within the rough center of a ship, this Master Repair Hub collects dark matter from the outter perimeter of the ship and refabricates it into materials for reconstruction of the hull, and can also fabricate hyperspace fuel out of it. How it is able to collect dark matter has yet to be revealed to humans by the Quarg.

outfits.name: Quarg Microsystems (POOT)
outfits.description: A Quarg systems block, containing varying types of complex and egnigmatic Quarg technology. This versatile collection of core components is commonly used by the Quarg on their small fighters and drones, as it's capable of handling most requirements on a starship outside of their propulsion and weapons.

outfits.name: HRL-BDB Generation Expansion (POOT)
outfits.description: An advanced energy generation expansion designed to synergize with a reactor. This reactor core expansion is highly efficient for its size, although is far more advanced than standard reactor generation cores, resulting in higher production costs.

outfits.description: By attatching a heat shunt directly to the reactor, this Korath cooling expansion is capable of aiding in the incredibly high thermal output of most Korath generators.

outfits.name: Plasma Core Addition (POOT)
outfits.description: This massive addition installs a Korath Plasma Core to an existing reactor. The processes involved cause it to lose some efficiency in both power generation and in heat output, but saves tremendously on outfit space. The extensive modifications and additional supporting structure also add a fair bit of weight to the Plasma Core.

outfits.name: Korath Generator Addition (POOT)
outfits.description: A small-scale Korath Generator, connected and wired into the existing reactor to provide a boost in overall production. While it produces a high energy amount for its size, like most Korath Generators, it has very poor utilization of proper thermodynamics and heat transfer.

outfits.name: Korath Shield Matrix (POOT)
outfits.description: A Korath Shield Matrix can be installed onto an existing reactor, redirecting some of the output power into the shield matrix, resulting in an improved shield strength.

outfits.name: Korath Reactor Plating (POOT)
outfits.description: By lining the reactor with a reinforced plating, it can increase both the reactor and the ships overall durability.

outfits.name: Automaton Shield Module (POOT)
outfits.description: A Korath Shield Matrix can be installed onto an existing reactor, redirecting some of the output power into the shield matrix, resulting in improved shield generation.

outfits.name: Automaton System Repair Module (POOT)
outfits.description: This repair module acts as a central hub for repair microbots, supplying them with energy while also acting as a system analyzer for the current status of damaged areas across the host ship. For proper operation, it needs to be constantly powered, resulting in a constant energy drain and heat output.

outfits.name: Biochemical Cell Core (POOT)
outfits.description: A small-scale version of a Biochemical Cell adapted to be directly mounted to a reactor, capable of increasing a reactors output by harnessing the energy of electricity-producing microorganic cells.

outfits.name: Biochemical Dual Core (POOT)

outfits.name: Cirrus Shielding Matrix (POOT)
outfits.description: A compact shielding matrix capable of redirecting a large amount of energy to increase shield regeneration. For a shield matrix of its size, its output is notably high.

outfits.name: Optic Lasing Generation Core (POOT)
outfits.description: A small Optic Lasing Generator, capable of generating Optical Laser Power and transporting it via fiberoptic wiring. It generates optic power by directly converting from the reactor power output. The resulting optical beam is fairly weak, requiring a constant power supply in order to sustain a consistent string of photons throughout the fiberoptic cable.

outfits.name: Nucleolysis Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: This beam weapon creates a field inside which otherwise stable atomic nuclei rapidly decay. This effect seems to be inversely proportional to the mass of the nucleus, causing isotopes like deuterium to break down at a higher rate than heavier elements. As the resultant products have a higher energy state than the original nucleus, the beam cools its target, defying conventional thermodynamics. In practice, this beam can deplete a ship's deuterium fuel while causing the very matter of its hull to decay.

outfits.name: Heavy Nucleolysis Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: A far stronger weapon than the Nucleolysis Beam, this laser can rapidly destabilize atomic nuclei at incredible rates. How such a powerful and potent laser weapon was able to be manifested from the aberrant is unknown.

outfits.name: Heavy Nucleolysis Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A far stronger weapon than the Nucleolysis Beam, this laser can rapidly destabilize atomic nuclei at incredible rates. How such a powerful and potent laser weapon was able to be manifested from the aberrant is unknown.

outfits.name: Blue Optical Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: This lightweight laser can be fed a beam of light from a lasing generator, which is then combined and focused to produce an intense beam ideal for damaging other ships. By pulsing thousands of times each second, the beam can create thermal and mechanical shocks in the target material, enhancing its ability to drill through armor. Unlike the advanced beam weapons used by some other species, this laser is subject to the effects of diffraction, causing its damage to become less intense with distance while also rendering it invisible. However, precise optics allow the beam to be targeted from an exceptional range, despite the tenuous damage at the edge of the laser's reach. 	The laser itself only contains the optics needed to synthesize, focus, and target the beam, allowing the laser light to be produced elsewhere. Because of this, an Optical Lasing Generator is needed to run this laser, providing enough power to support a single Blue Laser.

The turret itself only contains the optics needed to synthesize, focus, and target the beam, allowing the laser light to be produced elsewhere. Because of this, an Optical Lasing Generator or Stacked Optical Lasing Generator are needed to run this turret.

outfits.name: Bombardment Artillery Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: The Bombardment Cannon was designed during the original war with the Quarg, in order to give Heliarch civilian ships a way to strike Quarg warships from a safe distance. But now, as with all their weapons, its use is limited to Heliarch warships.

outfits.name: Bombardment Artillery Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The Bombardment Cannon was designed during the original war with the Quarg, in order to give Heliarch civilian ships a way to strike Quarg warships from a safe distance. But now, as with all their weapons, its use is limited to Heliarch warships.

outfits.name: Bombardment Artillery Tri-Cannon (POOT)

outfits.name: Ion Hailstorm (POOT)
outfits.description: By modifying the ionic charging systems within the hailguns, these blasters are capable of firing a large amount of ionizing projectiles simultaneously and rapidly. While not having as much range as the Downpour, the hailstorm is far better at managing opposing vessels at a close range.

outfits.name: Ion Hailstorm Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Instead of just placing an Ion Rain Gun on a turret mount, the Heliarch tweaked the cycles of shots, having each shot be significantly more effective and seeing an overall increase to the weapon's range, but at the cost of a reload period.

outfits.name: Ion Downpour (POOT)
outfits.description: Unleashing a rapid flurry of ionic blasts, the Ion Downpour boasts an increase in projectile stability on top of its massive firerate improvement. It does need an increased amount of power in order to sustain its improved projectiles.

outfits.name: Ion Downpour Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Unleashing a rapid flurry of ionic blasts, the Ion Downpour boasts an increase in projectile stability on top of its massive firerate improvement. It does need an increased amount of power in order to sustain its improved projectiles.

outfits.name: Tripulse Shredder Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Three pulse cannons mounted onto a single turret mount, with decent turret tracking abilities.

outfits.name: Non-pulse Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A cluster of 9 Pulse Cannons capable of sustaining very heavy fire. While not suffering the slowed burst fire of the Tripulse shredder, the Nonpulse unfortunately doesn't come without its hinderances, as it requires more power per shot, and also proves to be a feasible challenge to cool such a vast number of firing cannons. Few Hai ships could even support a weapon of this magnitude, but during times of extreme need, extreme solutions will follow.

outfits.name: Non-pulse Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A cluster of 9 Pulse Cannons capable of sustaining very heavy fire. outfits.name: Arc Pulse Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A much larger and stronger Pulse cannon. While not as strong as some other superheavy weapons, it does do a wonderful job at showcasing the efficiency of the Hais modern engineering abilities.

outfits.name: Arc Tripulse Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A trio of Arc Pulse cannons. Unlike the Tripulse Shredder, this triple cannon has no downtime between shots, being capable of a continuous and steady fire rate. The cluster of cannons does however have a toll on its ability to disperse excess heat.

outfits.name: Arc Pulse Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Capable of outputing serious damage at a large distance while being highly efficient, the Arc Pulse turret is very favorable amongst the Unfettered.

outfits.name: Arc Tripulse Shredder Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A behemoth of Hai weaponry, the Arc Tripulse Shredder is one of the largest weapons ever developed in Hai space, almost weighing as much as some smaller Hai ships. Few Hai ships can even support such a weapon, but those that can are often built around the cannon itself.

outfits.name: Ionic Railgun (POOT)
outfits.description: By heavily modifying the Skipper Railgun to have an energized ionic intake, it can fire a high velocity projectile without the need for any physical ammo. While being capable of operating fully off of pure energy, it does cause the Railgun to gain a noable amount of weight and size, on top of having a much higher operation tempurature.

outfits.name: Ionic Railgun Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: By heavily modifying the Skipper Railgun to have an energized ionic intake, it can fire a high velocity projectile without the need for any physical ammo. While being capable of operating fully off of pure energy, it does cause the Railgun to gain a noable amount of weight and size, on top of having a much higher operation tempurature.

outfits.name: Ionic Rotary Railgun (POOT)
outfits.description: By converting its input electricity to three phase with a full brdige rectifier, this trio of Ionic Railguns can sustain a continuous firerate while using less energy than an equal amount of individual railguns.

outfits.name: Ionic Rotary Railgun Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: By converting its input electricity to three phase with a full brdige rectifier, this trio of Ionic Railguns can sustain a continuous firerate while using less energy than an equal amount of individual railguns.

outfits.name: Ionic Gatling Railgun System (POOT)
outfits.description: A modern marvel of Hai Engineering. The Ionic Railgun System is capable of firing 1,800 rounds per minute, while using even less energy per shot than the Rotary Railgun. Of course, loading so many railguns into a single space is bound to cause some sort of internal disruption, which the Railgun cooling system has taken the full force of. The recoil from the Railgun System is so strong, some smaller vessels use it as a backup emergency escape system.

outfits.name: Ionic Gatling Railgun Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A modern marvel of Hai Engineering. The Ionic Railgun System is capable of firing 1,800 rounds per minute, while using even less energy per shot than the Rotary Railgun. Of course, loading so many railguns into a single space is bound to cause some sort of internal disruption, which the Railgun cooling system has taken the full force of. The recoil from the Railgun System is so strong, some smaller vessels use it as a backup emergency escape system.

outfits.name: Ion Cannon Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Ion cannons do not inflict as much damage as some other weapons, but they disrupt the electrical systems on any ship they hit, draining its energy and causing its weapons to jam. If a ship has sizable battery reserves, this may have little effect, but for a ship running at near its energy generation capacity an ion strike can take it out of the battle for a few seconds while it recovers, or otherwise cause it to have difficulty firing its weapons.

outfits.name: Twin Ion Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Ion cannons do not inflict as much damage as some other weapons, but they disrupt the electrical systems on any ship they hit, draining its energy and causing its weapons to jam.
