outfits.name: Modified Unfettered Ion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Forsaking everything that modern Hai engineering stands for, this highly inefficient, colossal and intensively modified Ion turret is equipped with a wopping 8 Ion Cannons, firing at incredibly high speeds for such large cannons. For what purpose this turret was made is unknown, but it is highly condensed and compacted for such a massive weapon, which causes no shortage of heating problems.

outfits.name: Ionic Infusion Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: By using a large amount of power to charge an infused ionic bolt, the Ionic Infusion Cannon is capable of doing much larger damage than a Hai Ion Cannon.

outfits.name: Ionic Infusion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: By using a large amount of power to charge an infused ionic bolt, the Ionic Infusion Cannon is capable of doing much larger damage than a Hai Ion Cannon.

outfits.name: Ionic Infusion Dual Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: By using a large amount of power to charge an infused ionic bolt, the Ionic Infusion Cannon is capable of doing much larger damage than a Hai Ion Cannon.

outfits.name: Ionic Infusion Twin Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: By using a large amount of power to charge an infused ionic bolt, the Ionic Infusion Cannon is capable of doing much larger damage than a Hai Ion Cannon.

outfits.name: Flamethrower Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A crude but impressive-looking weapon, the Flamethrower ignites your hyperspace fuel and directs a stream of it towards your adversaries. The damage it does is relatively minor, but it can be useful for causing a target that is already operating near its thermal capacity to overheat, temporarily taking it out of the fight.

outfits.name: Plasma Flamethrower (POOT)
outfits.description: As if not crude and devestating enough, someone decided to turn the hairbrained idea of combining a plasma cannon and a flamethrower into reality. This heavily modified flamethrower has the components of a plasma cannon combined into the firing mechanisms of the flame thrower, resulting in a longer lasting and hotter cloud of plasma-infused hyperspace fuel. The plasma infusion process has the side effect of massively increases the firing energy requirements.

outfits.name: Plasma Flamethrower Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: As if not crude and devestating enough, someone decided to turn the hairbrained idea of combining a plasma cannon and a flamethrower into reality. This heavily modified flamethrower has the components of a plasma cannon combined into the firing mechanisms of the flame thrower, resulting in a longer lasting and hotter cloud of plasma-infused hyperspace fuel. The plasma infusion process has the side effect of massively increases the firing energy requirements.

outfits.name: Prototype Fusion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: This is a personally obtained prototype Fusion Cannon, a deadly, massive spinal weapon. Where it came from, nobody knows except the owner, and those who wish to ask are too afraid of being on the receiving end.

outfits.name: Fusion Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: The fusion cannon works by generating a small core of supercharged plasma and infusing it with hyperspace fuel in a very confined space, which then gets launched out into space to complete its reaction, or be intercepted by anything unfortunate enough to be within the line of fire. The result is an incredible exothermic explosion capable of destroying some smaller vessels in a single shot. The exact origins of the fusion cannon are shrouded in false claims, coverups, and mystery, still having been disputed to this day.

outfits.name: Fusion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The fusion cannon works by generating a small core of supercharged plasma and infusing it with hyperspace fuel in a very confined space, which then gets launched out into space to complete its reaction, or be intercepted by anything unfortunate enough to be within the line of fire. The result is an incredible exothermic explosion capable of destroying some smaller vessels in a single shot. The exact origins of the fusion cannon are shrouded in false claims, coverups, and mystery, still having been disputed to this day.

outfits.name: Proton Fusion Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A smaller model of the fusion turret designed and produced by the Syndicate. While not nearly as powerful as the Navy fusion cannon, the proton fusion cannon is capable of an overall higher rate of fire, while also consuming less hyper space fuel in the fusion process. Combined with its much smaller size, the proton fusion cannons main selling point is its versatility to be installed on much smaller vessels.

outfits.name: Proton Fusion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A smaller model of the fusion turret designed and produced by the Syndicate. While not nearly as powerful as the Navy fusion cannon, the proton fusion cannon is capable of an overall higher rate of fire, while also consuming less hyper space fuel in the fusion process. Combined with its much smaller size, the proton fusion cannons main selling point is its versatility to be installed on much smaller vessels.

outfits.name: Nuclear Fusion Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Haphazardously utilizing the mother of all fusion, the nuclear fusion cannon is a dreaded sight in the skies. By charging hyperspace fuel with nuclear fusion in its firing process, the cannon can release in incredible amount of energy in a single shot. The resulting blast from the cannon is far stronger than any known model of fusion cannon in human space, being capable of even slightly piercing through shields from the sheer force of the explosion.

outfits.name: Nuclear Fusion Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Haphazardously utilizing the mother of all fusion, the nuclear fusion cannon is a dreaded sight in the skies. By charging hyperspace fuel with nuclear fusion in its firing process, the cannon can release in incredible amount of energy in a single shot. The resulting blast from the cannon is far stronger than any known model of fusion cannon in human space, being capable of even slightly piercing through shields from the sheer force of the explosion.

outfits.name: Heavy Blaster Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The Heavy Blaster is a scaled-up variant of the ever-so-popular Energy Blaster design. These saw extensive use on several warships earlier in history, most notably as the main armament of the Firebird when it was first produced. Over time, the development of more advanced weapons such as the Particle Cannon and Plasma Cannon has supplanted the Heavy Blaster on newer craft, but it still performs consistently enough to be found on older serviceable ships.

outfits.name: Twin Heavy Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: A mounted pair of Heavy Blasters. While there are stronger and more efficient weapons than these that are readily availible, some captains still appreciate the feel of the classic blaster.

outfits.name: Twin Heavy Blaster Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A mounted pair of Heavy Blasters. While there are stronger and more efficient weapons than these that are readily availible, some captains still appreciate the feel of the classic blaster.

outfits.name: Quad Heavy Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: A cluster of four Heavy Blasters jammed into a single gun port. Why any captain would choose these over any more modern and efficient weapon is unknown, but somewhere out there, there are those who still love to see them in the sky...

outfits.name: Quad Heavy Blaster Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A cluster of four Heavy Blasters jammed into a single turret mount. Why any captain would choose these over any more modern and efficient weapon is unknown, but somewhere out there, there are those who still love to see them in the sky...

outfits.name: Quad Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: A Quad Blaster carries four guns on a single gun port, doubling the firepower of an ordinary Twin Blaster for ships with enough space to install one and energy to drive it.

outfits.name: X850 Gatling Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: For those unstable enough to install them, thise octuple-mounted set of blaster cannons can very well hold their own, even against much higher caliber blasters.

outfits.name: X850 Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: For those unstable enough to install them, thise octuple-mounted set of blaster cannons can very well hold their own, even against much higher caliber blasters.

outfits.name: Heavy Mining Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: The development of the Beam Laser in the mid-2400s not only led to advancements in space warfare, but also to the field of asteroid mining, as the traditional but inefficient method of towing asteroids to bases for extraction was supplanted by individual spacecraft that could precisely extract the ore from asteroids themselves. 	The modern Mining Laser is a derivative of the Beam Laser engineered to optimize mineral yield and extraction rates at the expense of range and shield damage.

outfits.name: Heavy Mining Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: While asteroid miners typically prefer more nimble ships that can keep speed with asteroids, the Mining Laser Turret makes it easier for large and slow ships with spacious cargo holds to mine. 	Mining Laser Turrets are designed to be used in conjunction with asteroid scanners, as being unable to target asteroids means you have to aim the weapon manually as if it were a fixed gun.

outfits.name: Electron Mining Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: The development of the Beam Laser in the mid-2400s not only led to advancements in space warfare, but also to the field of asteroid mining, as the traditional but inefficient method of towing asteroids to bases for extraction was supplanted by individual spacecraft that could precisely extract the ore from asteroids themselves. 	The modern Mining Laser is a derivative of the Beam Laser engineered to optimize mineral yield and extraction rates at the expense of range and shield damage.

outfits.name: Electron Mining Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: While asteroid miners typically prefer more nimble ships that can keep speed with asteroids, the Mining Laser Turret makes it easier for large and slow ships with spacious cargo holds to mine. 	Mining Laser Turrets are designed to be used in conjunction with asteroid scanners, as being unable to target asteroids means you have to aim the weapon manually as if it were a fixed gun.

outfits.name: Tri-Beam Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: A simple, yet compact design. Three beam lasers wired in series, welded together to fit within a single gun port of any ship, owned by a captain wishing to use one of the most famous pieces of technology to brace the galaxy.

outfits.name: Quad Beam Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A group of 4 beam lasers, tightly squeezed in and strapped to a turret mount. Designed to be highly compacted and provide a burst of unsuspecting damage from smaller ships, acting as the bane of fighter pilots everywhere.

outfits.name: Triple Heavy Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: A very potent set of heavy lasers wired and fired together. While not as efficient in space as a  Tri-Beam laser, they still find there use, being quite popular amongst miners and heavy warships.

outfits.name: Quad Heavy Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: An incredibly powerful but bulky turret, Quad Heavy Laser Turrets are a truely menacing sight. Typically only found on heavy warships, they are truly the bane of fighter pilots existence.

outfits.name: Triple Electron Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: A powerful collection of 3 Electron Beams wired and fired together. Beam weapons stronger than this are seldom seen in all of human space.

outfits.name: Quad Electron Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The epitome of condensed lasers, this turret mount has 4 beam lasers firing in unison. A fighter pilots nightmare, and the bane of all those who confront comabtive captains within The Deep.

outfits.name: Reverse Engineered Electron Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: An extensively modified Electron turret, with eight Electron beams haphazardly mounted onto a single turret mount. While most new beam weapon concepts in this region of space typically come from the Deep, this turret was designed and built by and for the Republic Navy, with some assistance from Lovelace Labs. As a result, it lacks many of the built-in safety and controls that Deep Engineers have worked in for the past few centuries, causing the resulting Electron super turret to be very innefficient when compared to some of the more stable designs from the Deep, but nevertheless produce an incredibly powerful beam of concentrated Electrons.

outfits.name: Particle Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A particle cannon equiped to be installed on a turret mount. While not as fast turning as one of the Syndicates proton turrets, its iconic firepower and range still have an edge over other blasters of similar scale.

outfits.name: Twin Particle Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A sturdy pair of particle cannons mounted to a single gun port.

outfits.name: Twin Particle Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A heavyduty particle turret capable of sustaining a fast fire rate.

outfits.name: Quintuple Particle Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Known as "The Big One" by Navy captains across the Republic, this is the pinnacle of Navy artillery and engineering. A cluster of 5 particle cannons wired in series, condensed and confined within a single gun port. A titan of a weapon capable of outputing massive damage, with equally massive outfit space and energy requirements. Due to the highly compact design of this turret, it is known to generate more heat than its predecessors.

outfits.name: Quintuple Particle Cannon Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Known as "The Big One" by Navy captains across the Republic, this is the pinnacle of Navy artillery and engineering. A cluster of 5 particle cannons wired in series, condensed and confined within a single turret mount. A titan of a weapon capable of outputing massive damage, with equally massive outfit space and energy requirements. Due to the highly compact design of this turret, it is known to generate more heat than its predecessors.

outfits.name: Tri-Proton Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Created as an attempt to match the Navy's latest particle cannon, this cannon falls a bit behind. It does still, however, have its users across the galaxy.

outfits.name: Tri-Proton Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Made as an attempted improvement over the triple proton cannon, this turret enters the market as somewhat viable. However, its massive size does admitably hinder its usability on smaller vessels.

outfits.name: Twin Plasma Cannons (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of plasma cannons mounted together. Quite the formidable weapon for the ships that have the capacity to install one.

outfits.name: Plasma "Threepeater" Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Pirates fear it. Captains want it. The Threepeater is no pushover when it comes to dishing out fast-paced heat-pack punches.

outfits.name: Plasma "Threepeater" Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Bigger. Better. Badder. Stronger. Threepeater ain't nothin to mess around with.    The plasma Threepeater turret boasts a faster turning speed than the Plamsa Quad Turret, with the penalty of less damage, but also less outfit space.

outfits.name: Plasma Quad Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Some would say the Plasma Cannon Quad cannon might be a bit overkill in terms of its size. Others say it should have even more cannons on it. Boasting an incredible firerate, and an equally impressive size, it can level most smaller ships all on its own. Assuming you have the room to install it, that is.

outfits.name: Plasma Quad Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A direct upgrade to the Plasma Turret, this massive roster of plasma cannons can fire 24 shots a second. The increased weight of the cannons on the turret base slows donw the turning rate of the turret itself, although the stability and longevity of the launched plasma has been notably improved on, giving it an increased targeting range to compensate. Upon closer inspection of the turret, you see a note attatched to the underside of one of the barrels: "To those who so desperately pushed for more even more cannons... it turns now. savvy?"

outfits.name: Plasma Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: This heavy duty plasma slowly builds up a charge of plasma, releasing it as a fast moving plasma fireball, dealing massive heat damage to those unfortunate enough to get caught in the blast. The charging process is very energy intesive, and firing has notable recoil from the controlled explosion required to launch so much plasma at once.

outfits.name: Plasma Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A heavy plasma cannon mounted to a turret. Powerful, but due to the immense size of the cannon, the plasma turret mount does not turn very easily.

outfits.name: Dual Plasma Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of superheavy plasma cannons mounted into a single gunport. An incredibly powerful piece of equipment for the ships that have the capacity to install one of these behemoths.

outfits.name: Dual Plasma Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of superheavy plasma cannons installed onto a single turret mount. An incredibly powerful piece of equipment for the ships that have the capacity to install one of these behemoths.

outfits.name: Particle Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Designed for the might of Navy warships, the Particle Heavy cannon is meant to instill the pure fear of the Republic Navy to all those that oppose it. This massive cannon has a much longer range and faster projectile speed than the standard particle cannon, with huge additional energy requirements to match.

outfits.name: Particle Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: As if the Particle Heavy Cannon was not enough, the full might of the Navy can now be seen through a turret of one of their largest weapons.

outfits.name: Dual Particle Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of particle cannons so massive, some of the Navy Carriers and Cruisers in action can only install one. Capable of twice the firerate of the Particle Heavy Cannon.

outfits.name: Dual Particle Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Only the largest of capital ships could install more than one of them, assuming they even have the energy and cooling capabilities to fully utilize them.

outfits.name: Proton Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: After the attempt to recreate Navy artillery that was the Proton Cannon, some of the Syndicate decided to allow their engineers to build off of their previous works. The result is a massive cannon that fires a ray of protons at an incredible velocity and distance.

outfits.name: Proton Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive rotating Proton Cannon may not be every captain of a large vessel's first thought when it comes to what heavy artillery they want to install, but to some they are the only turret a pilot needs. While still sharing the same innaccuracy problem as the original, it does turn faster than most weapons of its size.

outfits.name: Dual Proton Heavy Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: Somewhere out there, a Syndicate engineer is very pleased with his own creation entering the public market. Most will be hard pressed to find a heavy cannon of this size with such a high rate of fire.

outfits.name: Dual Proton Heavy Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of Colossal proton cannons, mounted onto a single turret platform for heavy warships to wipe out fighters and interceptors alike from the sky.

outfits.name: Neutron Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: The Neutron Beam was an experiment by Solaria Labs into beam lasers, a technology relatively unchanged in the past few centuries. Utilizing the pull of condensed neutrons, it channels a strong beam of photons to rapidly accelerate towards its target, resulting in a direct ray of high velocity photons being rapidly launched from the Neutron Beam. Unfortunately, the photons do not remain stable for long, resulting in difficulty controling the beam.

outfits.name: Neutron Beam Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The Neutron Beam was an experiment by Solaria Labs into beam lasers, a technology relatively unchanged in the past few centuries. Utilizing the pull of condensed neutrons, it channels a strong beam of photons to rapidly accelerate towards its target, resulting in a direct ray of high velocity photons being rapidly launched from the Neutron Beam. Unfortunately the photons do not remain stable for long, resulting in difficulty controling the beam.

outfits.name: Twin Neutron Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: The Neutron beam is already questionably stable, so some captains would think twice about trying to jam two of them into a single gunport. The result of such an experimental combination is a notable increase in heat output, and energy consumption from the increased amps required to sustain fire for two gigantic beam lasers.

outfits.name: Twin Neutron Beam Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: If you wanted pure instability in a single instance, the Twin Neurtron Turret fits the bill. Few ships in human space can even install one of these gargantuan turrets, let alone would most even dare to. With some of the largest energy requirements of any human weapon ever made, and the most heating problems to match, few weapons can rival its capabilities on the battlefield.

outfits.name: Superheavy Energy Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: The iconicness of the Energy Blaster needs no explanation. It would only make sense for a weapon and outfit resaerch group to try and update or expand on such a staple technology, as Solaria Research Labs has done with the Superheavy Energy Blaster. Now capable of competing with other heavy warship weapons, the energy blaster gets new life breathed into it by newbie and senior heavy ship captains alike.

outfits.name: Superheavy Blaster Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: It would only make sense to develop a turret equivalent to a new weapons technology, and so Solaria Labs has. With a notably fast turn rate for a weapon of its size, the Superheavy Blaster Turret holds its own amongst the combative captains and pirates traversing the stars.

outfits.name: Twin Superheavy Energy Blaster (POOT)
outfits.description: An experimental update to the Superheavy Energy Blaster, the Twin Superheavy Energy Blaster features two sidemounted Superheavy Blasters wired in series with its own customized weapons control board, resulting in an improved firerate over mounting two of the original cannon. the increase in firing speed does not come without its drawback, as it overwhelms the built in heat dissapation system of the blaster.

outfits.name: Twin Superheavy Blaster Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A turret version of the Twin Superheavy Blaster. This blaster has its own updated and modified version of the custom built control board from the original, resulitng in slightly better cooling and turret speed. However, the turret modifications on the control board do cause the turret to consume more energy in the rotation process.

outfits.name: Heavyduty Mining Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: The staple of the mining laser amongst prsopecters can not be understated. The Heavyduty Mining Laser mining beam attempts to appeal to said audience. This beam laser is capable of strong precision, being able to target the weakest seams along an asteroid, quickly and accurately splitting it into larger and finer chunks.

outfits.name: Heavyduty Mining Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The staple of the mining laser amongst prsopecters can not be understated. The Heavyduty Mining Laser mining beam attempts to appeal to said audience. This beam laser is capable of strong precision, being able to target the weakest seams along an asteroid, quickly and accurately splitting it into larger and finer chunks.

outfits.name: Corite Mining Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: An experimental mining laser with an upgraded internal scanning system. This mining laser sports an internal analysis control board that is capable of analyzing an asteroids surface and quickly finding the exact locations to target for maximizing ore harvesting. It also can slightly adjust its aim for more accurate prospecting capabilities.

outfits.name: Corite Mining Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: An experimental mining laser with an upgraded internal scanning system. This mining laser sports an internal analysis control board that is capable of analyzing an asteroids surface and quickly finding the exact locations to target for maximizing ore harvesting.

outfits.name: Reacher Tractor Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: A tractor beam with a far longer range, and slightly improved retracting speed. Because the tractor beam itself reachs so much further, its energy consumption is greatly increased.

outfits.name: Heavy Tractor Beam (POOT)
outfits.description: In a recent attempt by Solaria Labs to improve upon the original Tractor Beam technology, this heavyduty tractor beam notably outperforms its predecessor. However, being almost 4 times the size of the original, only the largest of mining ships might find any practical use in it.

outfits.name: Meteor Missile Squadron Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: Relying off of the Meteor Missles greatest strength, the Squadron Launcher fires 15 meteor missiles simultaneously in a single launch. While it might be more practical and effective to install a single launcher for a more damaging missile, the Squadron Launcher excells at allowing stronger launchers to successfully dodge enemy antimissiles. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Meteor Missile Squadron Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A heavily modified Squadron Launcher installed onto a turret mount. While being much more effective than the base Squadron Launcher, the turret installation modifications have the side effect of hindering its cooling capabilities, while also reducing capacity for missile storage due to the newly added mechanical systems requiring additional space. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Neutron Torpedo Pod (POOT)
outfits.description: The Neutron Torpedo is a thermodynamically charged torpedo infused with accelerated neutrons modified by a miniature-scale particle accelerator installed within the launcher itself. The launcher actively requires power even when not firing in order to provide the charged particles for the torpedos. The result of this process is a slow-charging but very fast moving torpedo, albeit slightly weakened by the fusion process.

outfits.name: Neutron Torpedo Pod Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A Neutron Torpedo Pod mounted installed a turret mount. The additional circutry and mechanical systems required to port such a complex weapon into a turret increase the energy demands, while also affecting its heat dispersion.

outfits.name: Neutron Torpedo Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: The Neutron Torpedo is a thermodynamically charged torpedo infused with accelerated neutrons modified by a miniature-scale particle accelerator installed within the launcher itself. The launcher actively requires power even when not firing in order to provide the charged particles for the torpedos. The result of this process is a slow-charging but very fast moving torpedo, albeit slightly weakened by the fusion process.

outfits.name: Triple Neutron Torpedo Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: An experimental tripod launcher devoloped by Solaria Labs. The requirements for proper operation has a massive drain on energy, and requires a few crew to properly operate.

outfits.name: Neutron Torpedo Tripod Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Not many would consider mounting a heavyduty particle accelerator powering three supercharged torpedo cannons onto a turret mount a feasible job, but the Engineers at Solaria Labs begged to differ. The requirements for proper operation has a massive drain on energy, as well as requiring multiple crew members to adequately accomodate such a complex turret.

outfits.name: Atomic Neutron Torpedo Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: By infusing tremendous amounts of energy into a torpedo, it compacts the resulting fusion particles from the internal particle accelerator even further than the standard neutron torpedo.  The result is an incredible amount of energy being confined into a single torpedo, waiting for something to unleash it. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Heavy Rocket Heaver (POOT)
outfits.description: The Heavy Rocket Heaver has an internal hooking system that attatches onto the rocket with strong tension before it launches, and just as the rocket's propellant ignites, releases the tension on the attatched hook, launching the rocket out at a much higher velocity. This also allows the launcher to operate at much cooler tempuratures than the standard Heavy Rocket Launcher by reducing the launch time spent in the firing chamber, while also requiring additional energy to operate the internal mechanism. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Heavy Rocket Heaver Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A Heavy Rocket Heaver mounted onto a turret. Alongside the turret modifications, this Heavy Rocket Heaver also features an updated and improved launching mechanism, granting it a faster ammunition reloading speed. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Dual Javelin Pod (POOT)
outfits.description: Being not much more than a pair of Javelin Pods designed for a single gunport, this heavy pair of pods can fire 8 javelins a second. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Javelin Sextuple Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: One day at Solaria Labs, a researcher was stumped, racking their brain trying to think of how they could modify a Javelin Turret to make it better, build off of it, make it stronger. Feeling frustrated after days with no sign of advancement in sight, the researcher decided to take a visit to the Heavy Weaponry sector and walked up to a lead Solarian weapons engineer, hoping to get a second opinion on how they should improve the turret. Upon being asked if they had any ideas to overhaul a Javelin Turret, The engineer simply responded with one word... 	"More". 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Javelin Sextuple Pod (POOT)
outfits.description: By combining 6 individual Javelin Launchers into one behemoth of a missile launcher, it is capable of firing 24 Javelin missiles per second. Its not very space efficient, or practical compared to other weapons of equal size, but somewhere out there, someone is very proud of themselves for the invention of this weapon. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Sidewinder Fleet Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of sidewinder missile pods wired in series. It can sustain a firerate of 5 Sidewinder missiles per second, with a brief cooldown. While it might be cheaper or more practical to install an alternative like the Meteor Squadron Launcher, legend has it this launcher was made to make a mockery of a specific Lovelace Lab anti-missile specialist. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Sidewinder Fleet Launcher Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of sidewinder missile pods wired in series. It can sustain a firerate of 5 Sidewinder missiles per second, with a brief cooldown. While it might be cheaper or more practical to install an alternative like the Meteor Squadron Launcher, legend has it this launcher was made to make a mockery of a specific Lovelace Lab anti-missile specialist. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Sidewinder Swarm Launcher (POOT)
outfits.description: The executives at Lovelace Labs antimissile department were seething at the news of this new heavy launcher. A single swarm launcher is capable of firing 400 sidewinders a minute.    It costs 72,000 credits, to fire this weapon... for twelve seconds. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Sidewinder Swarm Launcher Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The executives at Lovelace Labs antimissile department were seething at the news of this new heavy launcher. A single swarm launcher is capable of firing 400 sidewinders a minute.    It costs 72,000 credits, to fire this weapon... for twelve seconds. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Solarian Meteor Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solaria Meteor Missle Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical meteor launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Sidewinder Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Sidewinder Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical sidewinder launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Javelin Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Javelin Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical javelin launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Javelin Turret Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Javelin Turret Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical javelin turret, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Torpedo Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Torpedo Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical torpedo launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Typhoon Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Typhoon Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical typhoon launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Solarian Heavy Rocket Array (POOT)
outfits.description: A Solarian Heavy Rocket Array is capable of firing at over 4 times the speed of a typical heavy rocket launcher, but lacks any form of tracking capabilities. 	Solarian Missile arrays don't accept traditional ammo, instead they must be sustained by something else...

outfits.name: Nuclear Missile Assembling Chamber (POOT)
outfits.description: It has been centuries since the last nuclear war was fought, and until very recently, most people in the galaxy assumed that that era of chaos and destruction was forever behind us... That is, untill someone decided to start mass producing them...

outfits.name: Nuclear Missile Assembling Chamber (Turret) (POOT)
outfits.description: It has been centuries since the last nuclear war was fought, and until very recently, most people in the galaxy assumed that that era of chaos and destruction was forever behind us... That is, untill someone decided to start mass producing them...

outfits.name: Modified Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: By heavily modifying the barrely with additional heatsinks, the modified gatling gun is capable of sustaining a continuous firerate without needing to cooldown. The increased firerate does make it run overall hotter than the original, with the heatsinks ejecting all the additional heat into their surroundings, some of which reaches the ship. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Modified Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: One of the last sight any southern merchant wants to witness, the Modified Gatling Turret is a favorite of pirates and scrappers alike. Unleashing a swarm of 7200 rounds a minute, this weapon can shread through any unsuspecting travelers hull in moments. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Heavy Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: While gatling guns can be very effect at shredding the hull of a smaller ship, they pale at fighting larger vessels. The heavy gatling gun doesn't.    The Heavy Gatling gun fires much larger rounds with shield piercing coating, all while keeping the same rate of fire as its smaller predecessor.  	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Heavy Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: There are tales from the frontier about high ranking pirate captains commandeering Navy Cruisers using this turret. Storing a wopping 48,000 rounds, this pair of shield piercing heavy rotary cannons can hold their own ground, even against some of the Navys heavy artillery. 	Ammunition for this weapon can be restocked at any outfitter.

outfits.name: Modified Heavy Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: Modified by Solarian Engineers to accept the input from a quantum reactor, this heavy gatling gun does not require any ammunition, but has a massive power requirement.    This Heavy Gatling Gun modified by Solaria Labs only takes some sort of none-physical ammunition...

outfits.name: Modified Heavy Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Few weapons can instill the type of dread that a Gatling Gun that needs no physical ammunition and can pierce through a ships shields... Let alone one installed on a swift rotating turret mount.    This Heavy Gatling Gun modified by Solaria Labs only takes some sort of none-physical ammunition...

outfits.name: Scrapper Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: A highly innaccurate rapid rotary gun, the Scrapper Gatling Guns target audience is primarily intercepters. By modifying the Gatling Gun with an internal energetic combustion system, it can fire an energetic blast akin to that of a standard bullet. The process of course causes the Scrapper Gatling Gun to use far more energy to fire than the standard Gatling Gun while also losing a lot of accuracy and damage in the process. However, it's far smaller than most Human weapons, making it an ideal choice for interceptors.

outfits.name: Scrapper Twin Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: A highly innaccurate pair of rapidfire rotary guns. By modifying the Gatling Gun with an internal energetic combustion system, it can fire an energetic blast akin to that of a standard bullet. The process of course causes the Scrapper Gatling Gun to use far more energy to fire than the standard Gatling Gun while also losing a lot of accuracy and damage in the process. However, it's far smaller than most Human weapons, making it an ideal choice for interceptors.

outfits.name: Scrapper Tri-Gatling Gun (POOT)
outfits.description: A trio of the highly innaccurate rapid rotary guns, the SCrapper Tri-Gatling Gun is a weapon that finally is capable of being utilized by ships beyond that of fighters and interceptors. While it's not as strong as some other human weapons, it does fire far faster than most.

outfits.name: Scrapper Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Known simply as "the Scrapper" by southern and Dirtbelt merchants, the scrapper gatling turret is a weapon known for its ability to instill fear into those unlucky enough to have to come face to face with one.

outfits.name: Scrapper Gatling Quad-Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: By extensively modifying the turret base of the Scrapper Gatling Turret, somewhere, someone was able to make a modified version that incorporates 2 additional Scrapper Gatling Guns onto the rotating base. The result is a formidable rapidfire Gatling turret, well capable of holding its own against decently sized vessels.

outfits.name: Scrapper "Octogatler" Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: Ripped straight from one of Dr. Richard J. Gatling's nightmares, the "Octo" Scrapper Gatling Turret is a bulky amalgamation of 8 Scrapper Gatling Guns crammed onto a single turret base. While the origins of this turret may be relatively unknown, it's ability to hold its own ground definitely is. This massive turret has allowed the tiny Scrapper Gatlers to see a fresh breath of new life, with some captains having reported encountering them on large pirate warships.  The sheer amount of guns installed and firing simultaneously not only puts an increased burden on the turret mount, causing it to rotate slower, but also produces an exorbitant amount of excess heat while firing.

outfits.name: Modified "Octogatler" Gatling Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: One of the latest experimental creations by Solaris Labs, this extensively modified Octogatler turret fires far stronger and more condensed energetic projectiles at an much greater velocity, both strengthening its damage and giving it a notable range boost over the Scrapper Gatling guns which it was built off of. The cost? The turret mounts size restraints, resulting in an incredibly poor heat dissapation system, along with a massive amount of energy consumption from its rain of perpetual energetic hellfire.

outfits.name: Squadron Anti-Missile System (POOT)
outfits.description: Anti-Missiles are an ancient technology, with few improvements made over time. The Squadron Anti-Missiles is an attempt by Lovelace at changing that. Capable of rapidly shooting down smaller missiles, the Squadron Anti-Missile System is a collection of smaller Anti-Missiles connected through an advanced central control system, capable of outperforming antimissiles of notably heavier build.

outfits.name: "Delta" Superheavy Anti-Missile System
outfits.description: A superheavy Anti-Missile turret developed and designed for the Navys Capital ships by Lovelace Labs. Capable of destroying a magnitude of oncoming missiles all by itself, this heavyduty Anti-Missile turret is amongst the strongest developed in human history.

outfits.name: Korath Tripulse Detainer (POOT)
outfits.description: A rotating trifecta of one of the most notorious weapons in Korath space, the Tri-Detainer instills fear as massive as the weapon itself within its victims.

outfits.name: Blaze-Pike Lance (POOT)
outfits.description: The seeming reverence the Korath have for fire appears embodied in this weapon. This pair of Fire-Lances mounted together in a gun port do not merely create twin lances of fire: Rather, they begin to form a gestalt - a single, longer, hotter, and almost hypnotic column of fire.

outfits.name: Korath Inferno Lance (POOT)
outfits.description: Some Korath consider the Inferno the crowning achievement of Exile weapon design. Three Fire-Lances mounted together in precisely the right manner combine synergistically, creating a longer, more powerful beam than three would individually.

outfits.name: Shield Disruptor Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: Shield Disruptor Turrets interfere with a ship's shields, allowing a ship's hull to be damaged even when shields are up. However, they do very little hull damage by themselves.

outfits.name: Shield Devastator (POOT)
outfits.description: A collection of three shield disrupters with enough shield disruption capabilities to scare captains without shield generators.

outfits.name: Shield Devastator Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: With the menace that was the Inferno, a Korath somewhere out there felt a shield disrupter of the same scale would deal sufficiently with enemy ships.

outfits.name: Modified Husk-Slice (POOT)
outfits.description: A heavily modified husk slicer capable of sustained fire. The increase in output does cause some overheating issues, in addition to increasing energy draw.

outfits.name: Modified Husk-Slice Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: This turret fires a tightly focused sustained energy beam capable of shredding hull armor. Combine it with a disrupter turret for a devestating combination.

outfits.name: Husk-Cleaver (POOT)
outfits.description: A colossal trio of heavily modified husk slicers capable of sustained fire. Their damage output on hull armor is unmatched in korath space.

outfits.name: Husk-Cleaver Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: This monstrous turret can sustain 3 continous beams of highly potent energy, capable of ripping hulls to pieces. The combined synergy with a Shield Devastator turret is almost unmatched.

outfits.name: Korath Wildfire Lance (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of Inferno lances welded together into a single gunport. The sheer heat output of this weapon is intimidating enough that some captains of larger ships with one installed have weekly fire-prevention training programs.

outfits.name: Korath Wildfire (POOT)
outfits.description: If the inferno is the ruler of the exiles weaponry, this is the crown's jewel. The jet of flames that erupt from this weapon are so hot, there are rumors of it melting off of its own turret mount and floating away in to space.

outfits.name: Korath Overreacher (POOT)
outfits.description: A direct upgrade to the Grab-Strike, the Overreach fires a much more potent projectile, allowing it to both last longer, and hit harder.

outfits.name: Korath Overreacher Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A direct upgrade to the Grab-Strike, the Overreach fires a much more potent projectile, allowing it to both last longer, and hit harder.

outfits.name: Cluster Warder Anti-Missile (POOT)
outfits.description: A group of modified Korath Warder Anti-Missiles, capable of targeting missiles from a further distance than a regular Warder.

outfits.name: Twin Thermal Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of Korath Thermal Repeaters. These weapons need to cool down between their shots to avoid overheating.

outfits.name: Triple Thermal Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A trio of Korath Thermal Repeaters. These weapons need to cool down between their shots to avoid overheating.

outfits.name: Triple Thermal Repeater Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A trio of Korath Thermal Repeaters. These weapons need to cool down between their shots to avoid overheating.

outfits.name: Thermal "Hellfire" Chain Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A devestating group of six Thermal Repeaters connected into a single gun port. This massive outfits heat output is notably high due to the incredible amount of energy that has to be coursing through the weapon for its operations.

outfits.name: Thermal "Hellfire" Chain Repeater Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A devestating group of six Thermal Repeaters connected into a single gun port. This massive outfits heat output is notably high due to the incredible amount of energy that has to be coursing through the weapon for its operations.

outfits.name: thermal chain repeater blast (POOT)
outfits.description: A devestating group of six Thermal Repeaters connected into a single gun port. This massive outfits heat output is notably high due to the incredible amount of energy that has to be coursing through the weapon for its operations.

outfits.name: Heavy Thermal Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A superheavy modification of a Korath Thermal Repeater. By internally superheating the plasma before firing, the Heavy Thermal Repeater unleashes an explosive plasma fireball onto its victims, causing immense heat damage to the target and anything caught within the surrounding blast.

outfits.name: Heavy Dual Thermal Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of the modified superheavy Korath Thermal Repeaters. Few Korath ships have the capacity to install multiple of these, let alone handle the heat output from continuous use.

outfits.name: Heavy Thermal Repeater Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A pair of the superheavy Korath explosive burst cannons, now on a rotating turret. The modifications to install them onto the turret platform result in less availible space for installing heat sinks, causing the already hot cannons to run at even higher tempuratures.

outfits.name: Heavy Thermal "Threepeater" Repeater (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive trifecta of superheavy Thermal Repeaters, extensively modified to fire in series with one another. Unfortunately mounting an additional cannon blocks off multiple existing heat sinks and airways on the Heavy Repeaters, causing higher than usual operating tempuratures.

outfits.name: Heavy Thermal "Threepeater" Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A massive trifecta of superheavy Thermal Repeaters, extensively modified to fire in series with one another. Unfortunately mounting the cannons onto a turret mount blocks off multiple additional existing heat sinks and airways on the already highly cooling inefficient Triple Heavy Repeater, resulting in even higher operating tempuratures.

outfits.name: Naval 88mm Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A slow firing heavyduty naval cannon. Long ranged, explosive, and very slow to reload.

outfits.name: Naval 88mm Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A slow firing heavyduty naval cannon. Long ranged, explosive, and very slow to reload.

outfits.name: Naval 500mm "Duke" Cannon (POOT)
outfits.description: A devestating and slow firing cannon. Nicknamed "The Duke", its monsterous power is matched only by its massive size. Well capable of obliterating smaller ships, and even some moderately sized warships.

outfits.name: Naval 500mm "Duke" Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A devestating and slow firing cannon. Nicknamed "The Duke", its monsterous power is matched only by its massive size. Well capable of obliterating smaller ships, and even some moderately sized warships.

outfits.name: Naval Class 1 Artillery Laser (POOT)
outfits.description: A slow firing and slow turning heavy duty naval laser. By charging an internal set of massive capacitor banks before firing, it can let out a much stronger centralized beam than most beam weapons in human space, however it must recharge its capacitors after every shot.

outfits.name: Naval Class 1 Artillery Laser Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: A slow firing and slow turning heavy duty naval laser. By charging an internal set of massive capacitor banks before firing, it can let out a much stronger centralized beam than most beam weapons in human space, however it must recharge its capacitors after every shot.

As if fulfilling their own intended destiny, the projectiles are guided to their target, disrupting their fuel systems. This utility, on top of being almost unavoidable, allows the weapon to lock down the Quarg's more distant enemies.

outfits.name: Quarg Harbinger (POOT)
outfits.description: This is a Quarg weapon of mass destruction, capable of damage far beyond anything in human space. Some call it "The Harbinger", as just the sight of one alone usually means someone is about to meet their untimely demise.    It achieves its catastrophic destruction by initiating an incredibly violent particle collision, which it then charges and condenses even further, resulting in a miniature super condensed blackhole on the brink of collapse. Just before it reaches its limit, the supercharged particle is then launched outwards into space, only surviving for a short period until it consumes enough surrounding mass to instantaneously explode into a supernova.     A Quarg weapon of this Calibur is typically beyond what the Quarg are willing to use in human space. There would have to be a truly meddlesome part of another species in order for any of the Quarg to be willing to bring one of their weapons of mass destruction into human space.

outfits.name: Ember Tear Turret (POOT)
outfits.description: The Ember Wastes are an anomalous region subject to forces that defy conventional physics: Energy spontaneously pouring from the vacuum, material density far greater than one would expect to find in space - even around a nebula, a concentration of wormholes unheard of in the galaxy, and regions where the universe itself seems to be in flux. This region, more than any building or ship, is the Remnant laboratory where they study the deepest workings of the universe. 	When asked to clarify whether the name refers to either ripping or crying, the technician looks at you with a curious expression, and replies 'both.' They then go on to explain that a very simplistic explanation for this weapon is that it is making micro-tears in the fabric of space-time, then cauterizing them together again. Should not the Ember Wastes cry at the necessity of such weapons? 	These massive weapons require special hardpoints, and are built in such few number that the Remnant distribute them directly on an as-needed basis. Due to the prodigious energy and fuel requirements, only the most massive of Remnant ships can support regular use of these weapons.

outfits.name: Ember Monsoon (POOT)
outfits.description: A colossal upgrade to an already titanic weapon. The Ember Monsoon boasts higher damage, lower fuel consumption, and a massive range increase. Such features are not to bear without their hinderances, however, as the Ember Monsoon has a much higher heat output, and consumes as much energy as an entire fleet of starships firing in unison. 	They say "Absolute power corrupts absolutely". Will it?

It uses an obscene amount of energy to trigger an extremely powerful thermonuclear reaction, directing most of the energy from the resulting explosion forwards in a devastatingly powerful beam of gamma radiation.
